comments.author: @pmbalele
comments.text: Yes, I saw part of this presentation in person when for  the first time left Sukuma land in Tanzania north visiting relatives in Dar es Salaam.  As individual born and raised in Sukuma land, I could not believe such earth like  such Kilimanjaro,  Serengeti and Uluguru landscape existed.  I was born and raised near Lake Nyanza or Lake Victoria where harsh environment described here do not exist..

replies.author: @trueglobe66
replies.text: It’s truly fascinating how diverse the landscapes are within Tanzania—thank you for sharing your personal experience with us! 😊🇹🇿

comments.author: @davidchakufwaya7242
comments.text: The more I watch these videos the more I'm aggrieved by these false man made boarders.... imagine Kenya, Uganda, Rwanda, Tanzania & Zambia termed as east Africa with one undemarcated land.....

comments.author: @davidchakufwaya7242
comments.text: Africa is unrealistically beautiful.. simply amazing ❤

comments.text: I'm a Tanzanian but I'm also wondering like is it this beautiful?
